Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.intro: Welcome to VentaGamingg. By accessing, registering, or using our services, you agree to be legally bound by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before making a purchase.
Terms.section1Text: VentaGamingg offers virtual goods transfer services related to third-party video games, specifically coins from EA Sports FC Ultimate Team mode. Our service is provided under two modalities:
Terms.comfortTrade: Comfort Trade: the user provides temporary credentials so our team can transfer coins directly to their account.
Terms.playerAuction: Player Auction: the user lists a specific player on the market and we acquire it at the agreed price, transferring the equivalent value in coins.
Terms.serviceValue: What is contracted is time, effort, and professional expertise of our team to execute the transfer. No physical or tangible goods are acquired in any case.
Terms.section2Text: VentaGamingg is not affiliated with, associated with, authorized by, sponsored by, or endorsed by Electronic Arts Inc. ("EA Sports"), FIFA, or any league, club, or professional player. All trademarks, logos, and commercial names mentioned belong to their respective owners and are used exclusively for descriptive purposes.
Terms.section3Intro: The user acknowledges and expressly accepts that EA Sports' Terms of Service prohibit coin transfers between accounts through unauthorized means. Consequently, using our service may involve risks, including but not limited to:
Terms.risk1: Temporary or permanent suspension of the user's account.
Terms.risk2: Restricted access to the Transfer Market.
Terms.risk3: Loss of coins, players, or other virtual goods from the account.
Terms.section3Disclaimer: VentaGamingg is not responsible for sanctions applied by EA Sports to the user's account as a result of using this service. By contracting, the user voluntarily assumes this risk.
Terms.section4Item1: Provide truthful, current, and complete information when placing an order.
Terms.section4Item2: Be the legitimate owner of the EA account where the transfer will be received.
Terms.section4Item3: Not share credentials with third parties during the process.
Terms.section4Item4: Comply with applicable legislation in your country of residence.
Terms.section5Text: Payments are processed through certified providers (MercadoPago, Stripe, bank transfer). Once payment is confirmed, the order enters the queue and is processed within the stated timeframe. We reserve the right to cancel and refund an order upon indication of fraud or breach of these terms.
Terms.section6Text: All site content (design, code, text, proprietary logos) is exclusive property of VentaGamingg and protected by intellectual property laws. Reproduction in whole or in part without prior authorization is prohibited.
Terms.section7Text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, VentaGamingg will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service. Our maximum liability is limited to the amount actually paid by the user in the order in question.
Terms.section8Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will take effect when published on the site. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of updated terms.
Terms.section9Text: For inquiries related to these terms, you can contact us through the support chat available on the site or our official WhatsApp channel.
Terms.footer: By continuing to use VentaGamingg, you declare that you have read, understood, and accepted all of these Terms and Conditions.

Refund.title: Refund Policy
Refund.totalRefundDesc: If your order hasn't started processing yet.
Refund.noRefundDesc: If coins have already been delivered to your account.
Refund.intro: At VentaGamingg, we understand that issues can arise. That's why we've established a clear and transparent refund policy adapted to the digital and consumable nature of our products.
Refund.section1Text: The virtual coins and transfer services we offer are consumable digital goods that, once delivered, cannot be returned to their original state. This policy is based on this characteristic.
Refund.section2Intro: You are entitled to a full refund in the following cases:
Refund.section2Item1: The order was paid but hasn't been assigned to our transfer system yet (PENDING status).
Refund.section2Item2: You request cancellation before submitting EA credentials (Comfort Trade) or listing the player on the market (Player Auction).
Refund.section2Item3: Due to an error attributable to VentaGamingg, we cannot complete delivery within a reasonable timeframe.
Refund.section2Item4: Unintentional payment duplication due to technical failure.
Refund.section3Text: If the transfer was executed partially (for example, 300k of 500k coins were delivered and the account suffered external restrictions), only the proportional difference for undelivered coins will be refunded, minus the operational cost of the transfer attempt.
Refund.section4Intro: Refunds will not be issued in the following situations:
Refund.section4Item1: Coins have already been credited to the user's account (order in COMPLETED status).
Refund.section4Item2: The user's EA account was suspended or restricted by EA Sports during or after the transfer (risk accepted under the Terms and Conditions).
Refund.section4Item3: The user provided incorrect, incomplete, or expired credentials that prevented delivery.
Refund.section4Item4: The user modified, disabled, or locked their account while the order was processing.
Refund.section5Intro: To request a refund, you must:
Refund.section5Item1: Contact us via WhatsApp or support chat within 72 hours of payment.
Refund.section5Item2: Provide the order ID and detailed reason for the request.
Refund.section5Item3: Attach screenshots or evidence if required by the reason.
Refund.section5Note: We will review your request within a maximum of 48 business hours and respond with a resolution. Approved refunds are credited to the same payment method used and may take 5-15 business days depending on the payment processor.
Refund.section6Text: As an alternative, you may choose to receive the refund as credit in your VentaGamingg wallet. This option is processed immediately and typically includes an additional bonus on the original amount.
Refund.importantText: By confirming your purchase, you declare that you understand and accept this policy. If you have questions before purchasing, please contact us first to review your case.
Refund.section7Text: For any questions about this policy, you can contact us through the support chat on the site or via WhatsApp, Monday to Saturday from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At VentaGamingg, we respect your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, protect, and share your personal information.
Privacy.section1Text: We collect information in the following ways:
Privacy.info1: Registration information: email, username, password (hashed), date of birth.
Privacy.info2: Payment information: transaction data, payment method, order history (processed by MercadoPago or Stripe).
Privacy.info3: EA Sports credentials: EA email and password (encrypted, Comfort Trade only).
Privacy.info4: Device data: IP address, browser type, operating system, cookies.
Privacy.info5: Behavioral data: pages visited, time on site, actions performed.
Privacy.use2: Process and deliver virtual coin orders.
Privacy.use3: Communicate with you about your account and orders.
Privacy.section3Text: EA Sports credentials are encrypted using AES-256-CBC before storage. They are only decrypted temporarily during transfer and then deleted from our servers. We never permanently store your EA passwords.
Privacy.section4Text: We share your information only when necessary:
Privacy.share1: Payment processors: MercadoPago and Stripe receive your payment data (regulated by PCI DSS).
Privacy.share2: Service providers: hosting, email, analytics (anonymized data only).
Privacy.share3: Legal authorities: if required by law or upon suspicion of illegal activity.
Privacy.shareNote: We never sell your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
Privacy.section5Text: We use cookies to enhance your experience. You can disable them in your browser, though this may affect site functionality. We do not track your activity on other websites.
Privacy.right3: Request deletion of your account and associated data.
Privacy.right4: Object to processing of your data.
Privacy.right5: Export your data in structured format.
Privacy.rightsNote: To exercise these rights, contact us through support chat or WhatsApp.
Privacy.section7Text: We retain your data while your account is active. Upon requesting deletion, we delete all your personal information within 30 days, except transaction records (required by law) which are retained for 7 years.
Privacy.securityNote: Despite our efforts, we cannot guarantee absolute security. Any data breach will be communicated within the timeframe required by law.
Privacy.section9Text: We reserve the right to modify this policy. Changes will take effect when published. Your continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of changes.
Privacy.section10Text: For questions about this privacy policy, contact us through the support chat on the site or via WhatsApp.
